title: Hyuga Misato
wikitext:
[]: Hyuga/Misato             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Nov 18, 2007 6:07 pm so what was the deal between Hyuga and Misato its was completely obvious that Hyuga wanted her (it kinda gave it away right before he was tanged) wonder how things wouldve gone between them if the JSSDF hadnt invaded (or 3I for that matter)

[]:             Quote Post by Kaminoyouni » Sun Nov 18, 2007 6:15 pm i believe the 'fave couple' thread is for this kinda thing.

[]: Re: Hyuga/Misato             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Nov 18, 2007 6:30 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: wonder how things wouldve gone between them if the JSSDF hadnt invaded (or 3I for that matter)

[]:             Quote Post by Semisubtle » Sun Nov 18, 2007 6:58 pm Yes, I agree with BrikHaus. This is Misato we're dealing with. I'm surprised she didn't get on that at all, actually. XD Poor Hyuga. He was so close!

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Nov 18, 2007 9:50 pm I don't think Hyuga is Misato's "type". She's happy to treat him as her gofer (see #11, where she has him taking care of her laundry) but, judging by the example of Kaji, when it comes to romance, she seems to go for the tall, well built, 'he-man' type. Hyuga is a 4-eyed nerd who will never score.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Nov 18, 2007 9:53 pm Shin-seiki wrote: I don't think Hyuga is Misato's "type". She's happy to treat him as her gofer (see #11, where she has him taking care of her laundry) but, judging by the example of Kaji, when it comes to romance, she seems to go for the tall, well built, 'he-man' type. Hyuga is a 4-eyed nerd who will never score.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Nov 18, 2007 9:58 pm BrikHaus wrote: After Kaji's death Misato was ready to sleep with Shinji. I'm sure she would have done it with Hyuga at that point had he been around.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Thu Nov 22, 2007 10:23 pm Shin-seiki wrote: BrikHaus wrote: After Kaji's death Misato was ready to sleep with Shinji. I'm sure she would have done it with Hyuga at that point had he been around.
